text.message: Thanks for leaving me so much guys 😂
yea rough one lol
I'll make the most of it I guess
11 12 with a port is a god tier spot, left that just for you :)
You're a true homie
Can trade sheep
wheat. nb green?
Ok
ill do it
sorry i typed to slow
Lol haha
Lucky rob there
Every spots a solo for me unfortunately
red im not trying to plow you
ah yeah you right lol
Except the 4 which was already blocked
I just chose the person with most cards
embargo when we're all on 2?
Think ur trades please? Look at the board and how it will develop
red needs wood and had brick
good trade for us
no one is going to give you 2f1 sheep trades when you have no sheep lol
I am not asking for something unreasonable, just to balance the game
Very disappointed at you trading with orange so easily and giving him monster port
easily blocked
think you need to be less strict with these trades man
Very bad block and rob there
good for me less brick more trades
ayo
daaamn
That is the reason I ask for more than 1:1, we need to balance the game
If you had traded 1 for 1 you would have the settle already
could actually be winning with all these nines
It is very important not to give 1;1 when the game is already unbalanced
you have been doing this since turn one
green you picked a setup with three resources, you cant blame us for it being unbalanced
if you are making a sacrificial starting pick you need to make deals beforehand, not after. you have no leverage now
I did it for the sake of the game, it would have been worse
It is funny to me that you don’t see the urgency of accepting my trade offers
man pls focus on your game
green i dont think you understand our perspectives. it is a 3 player game; if any one of us helps you while the others dont, it only hurts us
helping you at cost to ourselves is meaningless
Sorry
Not giving 1:1 when I am last place
gg?
damn 7
gg
Orange wins with 6
gg
